title: conoclinium ballotifolium
intro: Conoclinium ballotifolium, also known as Blue Bellsam, is a perennial herb in the Lamiaceae family native to North America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Conoclinium ballotifolium has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. Conoclinium ballotifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
